wikitext.*:
===={{g|Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl}}====
All of Cynthia's Pokémon have the maximum of 510 {{EV}}s, with all of her Pokémon having at least one stat with 252 EVs in it.

All of Cynthia's Pokémon except her Spiritomb (which has perfect {{IV}}s, with 31 in all six stats) have 31 IVs in five out of their six stats, with the remaining stat having 0 IVs.
